ai.title: Wipro shares in focus after bagging Olam deal worth more than $1 billion
ai.description: Wipro secured a major multi-year transformation deal with Olam Group, with total contract value expected to exceed $1 billion. The engagement includes acquiring Olams digital arm Mindsprint, strengthening Wipros AI-led capabilities. The partnership aims to enhance efficiency, resilience, and scale across Olams global farm-to-fork operations.

ai.title: Wipro Acquires 100% Stake In Mindsprint For $375 Million To Expand AI-Led Transformation Play
ai.description: Wipro has signed a definitive agreement to acquire a 100 percent stake in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd. and its subsidiaries for 375 million dollars. The acquisition, announced on April 5, 2026, aligns with an 8-year strategic deal with Olam Group expected to exceed USD 1 billion in contract value, strengthening Wipro’s AI-driven transformation capabilities.
